speaker: agent
text: Thank you for calling Example Clinic. How can I help you today?

speaker: caller
text: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment with Doctor Lee next Tuesday at ten AM.

speaker: agent
text: Sure, one moment while I check that availability.

speaker: agent
text: I found an opening with Doctor Lee on Tuesday at ten AM. I've booked that appointment for you. Your confirmation number is four eight two one three.
